name: io.github.taskhawk-systems/kevros
title: Kevros
description: Runtime intelligence for autonomous AI agents. Verify actions, record provenance, bind intents. ML-DSA-87 post-quantum signed attestations.

headers.name: X-API-Key
headers.description: Kevros API key (starts with kvrs_). Leave blank for free tier with 1,000 calls/month.

environmentVariables.name: KEVROS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Kevros API key (starts with kvrs_). Optional — auto-provisions free tier if not set.
